title: corchorus pumilus
intro: Corchorus pumilus, also known as the dwarf jute or small jute, is a plant species in the mallow family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Corchorus pumilus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
